ASTRALPARTYMOD-STAR_LIGHT_POWER.title: StarLight
ASTRALPARTYMOD-STAR_LIGHT_POWER.descript: At the end of this combat, gain Gold equal to this power's amount.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-STAR_LIGHT_POWER.smartDes: At the end of this combat, gain Gold equal to this power's amount.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-SWORD_AURA_POWER.title: Sword Aura
ASTRALPARTYMOD-SWORD_AURA_POWER.descript: The first 2 stacks each make your attacks deal 1 extra damage. The 3rd stack makes your attacks deal 2 extra damage. Maximum 3 stacks.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-SWORD_AURA_POWER.smartDes: The first 2 stacks each make your attacks deal 1 extra damage. The 3rd stack makes your attacks deal 2 extra damage. Maximum 3 stacks.
